## Summary

What checklist is being proposed or updated?

## Review Lens

- [ ] Design
- [ ] Development
- [ ] Content

## Purpose

What review task should this checklist support?

## Scope

- [ ] New checklist
- [ ] Update existing checklist
- [ ] Restructure checklist

## Proposed Content

List the key checks that should be included.

## Related Artifacts

- Related principles
- Related patterns
- Related workflows
- Related findings or examples

## Notes

Anything else reviewers should know.
